global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting travel bookings with special fares and a reward offer.

elements.label: blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: central graphic
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center, possibly representing a travel theme, with a light blue hue.

elements.label: overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller, semi-transparent shape overlaying the central graphic, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: left graphic
elements.description: An abstract shape on the left side, contributing to the overall travel theme with a light blue color.

elements.label: right graphic
elements.description: Another abstract shape on the right side, complementing the left graphic and enhancing the travel theme.

elements.label: small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the top left, possibly representing a feature or service.

elements.label: trip text
elements.description: Text in the center bottom area that reads 'Book your next trip', presented in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: claim button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Claim reward', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: small graphic
elements.description: A small graphic element that appears to be a decorative feature, positioned in the center.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline at the top that reads 'HorizonHop UGC', styled in a bold font.

elements.label: special fares text
elements.description: Text below the main headline that states 'Special fares today', designed to inform users about offers.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: reward claim text
elements.description: Text at the bottom that reads 'Claim reward', encouraging users to take action.
